calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mark Walther appeared in person for Ronald Low Suen (petitioner).

Mr. Walther stated that the accounting went back to 2018, that accounting to be paid by the estate, and that the heirs have signed off on the orders. First and final account and report of administration is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Jaime: Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-27-2024 Continued To Mar-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Dec-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
